name: Announcement
description: Template for company announcements, updates, and news

attention.content: Grab attention with the headline news

impact.content: Explain what this means for the audience

next_steps.content: Tell people what to do next

exampleScript: We have some exciting news to share. Today we're announcing [announcement]. This represents [significance]. For our customers, this means [benefit]. We couldn't have done this without your support. Here's what's coming next: [next steps]. Thank you for being part of our journey.
